rule CDB_Attack_on_Strykers_Microsoft_environment {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Attack on Stryker’s Microsoft environment wiped employee devices without malware"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-20"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-20"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-4253" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "UploadCfg" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-4253 - Tenda AC8 Web UploadCfg route_set_user_polic"; content:"CVE-2026-4253"; nocase; sid:8431845; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-3644 - Incomplete control character validation in h"; content:"CVE-2026-3644"; nocase; sid:3928344; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
